---
title: "Lukas W. Mayer"
about:
 template: jolla
 image: assets/luke-23.jpg
 links:
   - icon: github
     text: Github
     href: https://github.com/lukmayer
   - icon: medium
     text: Medium
     href: https://medium.com/@willuk
   - icon: envelope
     text: Email
     href: mailto:willuk@vivaldi.net
---

#### PhD Student in Cognitive Science at the University of California, Irvine.

\

Check out [*Research*](research.html) and [*CV*](cv.html) for my work.

Delve into [*About*](about.html) and [*Blog*](blog_index.html) for my life.

If you like what you see, consider dusting off that *RSS* feed reader ;)

Feel free to [reach out to me](maito:willuk@vivaldi.net) for comments, clarifications, or collaborations.
